title: GenePanel
description: Schema for `config/gene-panels/<id>.yaml`. Plan §S16.6 (a) — validates `GenePanel` shape before deserialization (`include_str!` schema-validate-before-deserialize discipline matching `_atom.schema.json`). A panel is either a flat `genes:` list or a `contrasts:` map of named directional buckets — never both. Composer / discover_* consumers pick the format their stage needs.

id.description: Stable panel id; must match the filename stem so directory listings stay byte-deterministic.

source.description: Citation / provenance line. Free-form; used only in SME-facing docs and prompts.

genes.description: Flat list of gene symbols. Use this when the panel has no directional contrast.

contrasts.description: Map of directional bucket → entries. Bucket names follow snake_case. Use this for panels split by contrast (e.g. `up_in_degeneration` / `up_in_healthy`).
